message:
chore(pager): mark scratch_arena() #[allow(dead_code)] until first migrated call site lands

The `scratch_arena()` accessor + its underlying `scratch_arena:
bumpalo::Bump` field were landed as infrastructure in an earlier
commit (IMPL-3 / AG-4B). No call site has been migrated yet, which
means `cargo check` / `cargo clippy` were warning about the unused
pub(crate) helper every time the pager compiled.

Add `#[allow(dead_code)]` to the accessor with a comment explaining
the staged migration plan: the arena infrastructure is landed first,
then individual hot-path sites (SmallVec spills, transient
HashMap/HashSet buffers, frame-plan scratch) opt in to the arena in
follow-up commits.

Field itself is reachable by downstream Drop / commit / rollback
code, so no lint fires on it; only the accessor needs the attribute.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
